nl_statement: Layer-1 structural properties of the SHB iteration: (i) shbPrev accessor with its zero/succ simp lemmas; (ii) closed-form recurrence shbIter_succ : x_{t+1} = x_t - η•f'(x_t) + β•(x_t - x_{t-1}); (iii) shbStochIter_succ for the noisy variant; (iv) plain GD iteration gdIter and the equivalence shbIter_beta_zero : shbIter 0 η f' x₀ xPrev t = gdIter η f' x₀ t (independent of xPrev); (v) the defining inequality of the stability region cuts out a closed set in ℝ × ℝ, with stabilityRegion = {ineq} ∩ ([0,1) × (0,∞)).
lean_signature:
namespace SHB.Foundations
def shbPrev (β η : ℝ) (f' : E → E) (x₀ xPrev : E) (t : ℕ) : E
theorem shbIter_succ : shbIter β η f' x₀ xPrev (t+1) = shbIter ... t - η•f'(shbIter ... t) + β•(shbIter ... t - shbPrev ... t)
theorem shbStochIter_succ : ...
def gdIter (η : ℝ) (f' : E → E) (x₀ : E) : ℕ → E
theorem shbIter_beta_zero : shbIter 0 η f' x₀ xPrev t = gdIter η f' x₀ t
theorem isClosed_stabilityRegion_ineq (L : ℝ) : IsClosed {p : ℝ × ℝ | p.2 ≤ 2*(1+p.1)/L}
theorem stabilityRegion_eq_inter (L : ℝ) : stabilityRegion L = {ineq} ∩ (Ico 0 1 ×ˢ Ioi 0)
assumptions: E real vector space (AddCommGroup E + Module ℝ E) for iter facts; pure ℝ for region facts
reuse_reason: bridges SHB-side reasoning to existing GD lemmas in optlib; closedness underlies any continuity-based stability argument on (β,η)
